records.question: Which categories in the Chocolate catalog published by Koepp-Rutherford handmade chocolate store have attribute values of 0 and were published on or before 2013-03-15 05:09:17 with their latest revision on or before 2017-09-26 12:10:36?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalogs.date_of_publication <= '2013-03-15 05:09:17' AND catalogs.catalog_name = 'Chocolate' AND catalogs.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-09-26 12:10:36' AND catalogs.catalog_publisher = 'Koepp-Rutherford handmade chocolate store' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalogs c
JOIN Catalog_Structure cs ON c.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id
JOIN Catalog_Contents cc ON cs.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes cca ON cc.catalog_entry_id = cca.catalog_entry_id
WHERE c.catalog_name = 'Chocolate'
AND c.catalog_publisher = 'Koepp-Rutherford handmade chocolate store'
AND c.date_of_publication <= '2013-03-15 05:09:17'
AND c.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-09-26 12:10:36'
AND cca.attribute_value = '0'

records.question: What catalog structure entries at the Category level are linked to Mountain Dew items with length exactly 8, width exactly 5, and a price in euros at most 457.4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.length = '8' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Mountain Dew' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category' AND catalog_contents.width = '5' AND catalog_contents.price_in_euros <= 457.4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure
INNER JOIN Catalog_Contents
ON Catalog_Structure.catalog_level_number = Catalog_Contents.catalog_level_number
WHERE Catalog_Structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category'
AND Catalog_Contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Mountain Dew'
AND Catalog_Contents.length = '8'
AND Catalog_Contents.width = '5'
AND Catalog_Contents.price_in_euros <= 457.4

records.question: What categories include a product named Sprite Lemo with height 1, width 3, product stock number 24 ec, priced exactly at 703.17 euros and 433.82 pounds, and have additional attributes set to 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.height = '1' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Sprite Lemo' AND catalog_contents.price_in_euros = 703.17 AND catalog_contents.product_stock_number = '24 ec' AND catalog_contents.price_in_pounds = 433.82 AND catalog_contents.width = '3' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents cc
JOIN Catalog_Structure cs ON cc.catalog_level_number = cs.catalog_level_number
JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes ca ON cc.catalog_entry_id = ca.catalog_entry_id
WHERE cc.catalog_entry_name = 'Sprite Lemo'
AND cc.height = '1'
AND cc.width = '3'
AND cc.product_stock_number = '24 ec'
AND cc.price_in_euros = 703.17
AND cc.price_in_pounds = 433.82
AND ca.attribute_value = '1'

records.question: Which products belong to the Jam catalog published by Grady & Kautzer with a publication date on or before 2011-07-22 04:57:19 and a latest revision date on or before 2017-03-30 09:15:37?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
WHERE catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Product' AND catalogs.catalog_name = 'Jam' AND catalogs.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-03-30 09:15:37' AND catalogs.date_of_publication <= '2011-07-22 04:57:19' AND catalogs.catalog_publisher = 'Grady & Kautzer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  cs.catalog_id
FROM 
  Catalog_Contents cc
  INNER JOIN Catalog_Structure cs ON cc.catalog_level_number = cs.catalog_level_number
  INNER JOIN Catalogs c ON cs.catalog_id = c.catalog_id
WHERE 
  c.catalog_name = 'Jam'
  AND c.catalog_publisher = 'Grady & Kautzer'
  AND c.date_of_publication <= '2011-07-22 04:57:19'
  AND c.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-03-30 09:15:37'

records.question: Which catalog structures include items where the price in pounds is exactly 405.75, capacity is 5, the attribute value is 0, the catalog publisher is Grady & Kautzer, and the prices in dollars and euros are at least 616.22 and 537.66 respectively?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.price_in_pounds = 405.75 AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '0' AND catalogs.catalog_publisher = 'Grady & Kautzer' AND catalog_contents.price_in_dollars >= 616.22 AND catalog_contents.price_in_euros >= 537.66 AND catalog_contents.capacity = '5'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents cc
INNER JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes ca ON cc.catalog_entry_id = ca.catalog_entry_id
INNER JOIN Catalogs c ON cc.catalog_level_number = c.catalog_id
INNER JOIN Catalog_Structure cs ON cc.catalog_level_number = cs.catalog_level_number
WHERE cc.price_in_pounds = 405.75
  AND cc.capacity = '5'
  AND ca.attribute_value = '0'
  AND c.catalog_publisher = 'Grady & Kautzer'
  AND cc.price_in_dollars >= 616.22
  AND cc.price_in_euros >= 537.66

records.question: Which catalog structures include items where the attribute is exactly 1, the product stock number is 49 cz, the length is 8, and the price is at most 475.79 dollars and 457.4 euros?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '1' AND catalog_contents.price_in_dollars <= 475.79 AND catalog_contents.product_stock_number = '49 cz' AND catalog_contents.price_in_euros <= 457.4 AND catalog_contents.length = '8'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents cc
JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes cca ON cc.catalog_entry_id = cca.catalog_entry_id
JOIN Attribute_Definitions ad ON cca.attribute_id = ad.attribute_id
JOIN Catalog_Structure cs ON cc.catalog_level_number = cs.catalog_level_number
WHERE ad.attribute_name = 'attribute_name'  -- Replace 'attribute_name' with the actual attribute name
  AND cca.attribute_value = '1'
  AND cc.product_stock_number = '49 cz'
  AND cc.length = '8'
  AND cc.price_in_dollars <= 475.79
  AND cc.price_in_euros <= 457.4
